_help: Copy this file to .lantern-secrets.json (gitignored) and fill in what you need. lanternGateSecret is required (it locks your workers); the rest are optional, per feature.
lanternGateSecret: a-long-random-string-you-choose — must match the GATE_SECRET wrangler secret set on BOTH workers
cloudflareApiToken: for deploys / D1 / Vectorize — a token scoped Workers Scripts:Edit + D1:Edit + Vectorize:Edit + Workers AI:Edit + Account:Read
opensubtitlesApiKey: optional — Movie Night subtitle fetch (free opensubtitles.com consumer key)
